input.command: REPO=$(gh repo view --json nameWithOwner -q .nameWithOwner) && gh api "repos/$REPO/pulls/36/comments" --jq '.[] | {user: .user.login, body: .body, path: .path, line: .line, created_at: .created_at}' && echo "---ISSUE COMMENTS---" && gh api "repos/$REPO/issues/36/comments" --jq '.[] | {user: .user.login, body: .body, created_at: .created_at}'

content.text:

The PR is clean — no changes needed.
